# Repo Map (auto-generated — DO NOT EDIT)

Generated by `node tool/doc_guard/run.mjs generate` at commit `42548eea`.
Cold-start summary for agent sessions: read this BEFORE exploring the repo by hand.
If it looks stale (commit far behind HEAD), regenerate it first.

## Database — Drift schema v7

- `card_events`: id, flashcard_id, type, occurred_at, detail
- `decks`: id, folder_id, name, target_language, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `flashcards`: id, deck_id, front, back, example_sentence, pronunciation, hint, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `flashcard_progress`: flashcard_id, box_number, due_at, review_count, lapse_count, is_suspended, buried_until, last_reset_at
- `flashcard_tags`: flashcard_id, tag, PRIMARY
- `folders`: id, parent_id, name, content_mode, color, icon, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `study_sessions`: id, entry_type, entry_ref_id, study_type, status, started_at, updated_at
- `study_session_items`: id, session_id, flashcard_id, sort_order, answered_at, created_at, updated_at
- `study_attempts`: id, session_item_id, result, study_mode, box_before, box_after, user_input, attempted_at, duration_ms

## Routes

| Path | Constant | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/` | `RoutePaths.root` | ✅ |
| `/home` | `RoutePaths.home` | ✅ |

Placeholders are wired in `lib/app/router/app_router.dart` / feature route files.

- Use cases: dashboard(2), deck(5), flashcard(10), folder(9), progress(4), search(1), study(11), tag(4) + study(0: )
